response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and leadership in project development, but lacks explicit experience in IT architecture design, UML modeling, and client-facing technical advisory — key for this role — and his German proficiency is only basic, falling short of the required C1 level.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective)
Proven full-stack engineering leadership across diverse tech stacks and domains
Strong track record in mentoring, workshops, and team knowledge sharing
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting C1 requirement
No clear evidence of UML, enterprise architecture design, or formal requirements management experience
Lacks documented experience in client advisory, risk/compliance, or IT consulting engagement leadership
